disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Constant, tight, band-like squeezing pressure around the whole head, built up gradually over three days rather than coming on suddenly
trigger_question_examples: Did it come on suddenly or build up?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a tight, squeezing pressure all around my head, like a vice. It built up over about three days, it didn't come on all at once.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Jaw feels locked and clenched, sore over both jaw muscles, with night-time teeth grinding and only partial mouth opening
trigger_question_examples: Are you clenching or grinding your teeth?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My jaw feels locked. It's sore on both sides and I can only open my mouth part-way. I've noticed I've been grinding my teeth at night.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Headache has not responded to two days of regular paracetamol and ibuprofen
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken anything for it, and did it help?
What have you tried so far?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been taking paracetamol and ibuprofen regularly for two days and it hasn't touched it at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No sudden 'thunderclap' or worst-ever-instant onset, no visual changes, no weakness, no trouble speaking
trigger_question_examples: Did the headache ever hit you suddenly like a thunderclap?
Any changes to your vision, weakness, numbness, or slurred speech?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, it didn't come on like a thunderclap — it built up. My vision's fine and I haven't had any weakness or trouble speaking.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever, no neck stiffness, no discomfort in bright light; feels nauseated at the thought of work but has not vomited
trigger_question_examples: Any fever or a stiff neck?
Does light bother your eyes? Have you actually vomited?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fever and my neck feels fine. Light doesn't bother me. I feel sick when I think about work but I haven't actually thrown up.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Ongoing work-related dread and rumination on ambiguous interactions with colleagues, holding back emotional expression at work, feeling isolated and self-doubting, and using sick leave
trigger_question_examples: What's going on at work that's weighing on you?
How have things been for you emotionally?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Work has been really hard. I dread the start of the week, I keep replaying little interactions with colleagues wondering what they meant, and I feel like I can't be myself there. I feel isolated even though the office is full of people, and I doubt myself constantly even though I'm good at my job.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Feels low and hopeless about the work situation but denies any thoughts of harming herself or of not wanting to be here, and is able to keep herself safe
trigger_question_examples: With everything weighing on you, have you had any thoughts of harming yourself or that life isn't worth living?
Do you feel safe in yourself at the moment?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's been getting me down and I feel a bit hopeless about work, but no — I haven't had any thoughts of hurting myself. I do feel safe.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Has not had her blood pressure checked recently and does not have a home blood-pressure monitor
trigger_question_examples: Do you have a way to check your blood pressure at home?
When was your blood pressure last measured?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I don't have a blood pressure machine at home and I can't remember the last time it was checked.
